name: Bloku!
author: Poki
description: Bloku! is a unique interpretation of the classic block puzzles. Draw and erase blocks from the board. Try to clear as many lines as possible without letting the blocks surpass the top. Are you ready to the newest addicting block puzzle? How do I play Bloku!? Click and drag with the mouse to draw the correct shapes. Who created Bloku!? Bloku! is created by Wonderkid Development. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Bloku! for free? You can play Bloku! for free on Poki. Can I play Bloku! on mobile devices and desktop? Bloku! can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
